examples.text: Upp med händerna, det här är ett rån!

notes: kept robbery example (added !); wrote wafer example (ett rån, neuter plural unchanged) for meaning 1
dropped both fragments ('högt upp i skyn', 'tunga skyar'); wrote a sky example and a gravy example
dropped archaic Bible-ish quote (icke/kunna) and the slash-laden multi-variant sentence; wrote a bark example and a scold example
kept 'Han snodde runt' for twist; dropped 'sno sig!' (idiom = hurry up, neither sense); wrote a steal/nick example

examples.text: En sådan här skiva till och jag måste byta stift.

notes: kept stylus example; wrote a diocese example for meaning 1

examples.text: Jag tvättar bilen med en svamp.

notes: dropped 'fotsvamp' (single compound = foot fungus, neither sense); wrote a mushroom and a sponge example
kept broadcast example; wrote a shipment example for meaning 1
both existing sentences kept and tagged: language vs German woman

examples.text: Vi går genom undergången under vägen.

notes: dropped both fragments ('världens undergång', 'mänsklighetens undergång'); wrote a downfall example and an underpass example
both existing sentences kept and tagged: entertain vs maintain
dropped 'meka i verkstaden' (slang fragment) and subjectless 'lämna in bilen på verkstad'; wrote a workshop example and a car repair-shop example
kept 'Har du någon växel?' for change (capitalised); dropped 'växeln förfaller på torsdag' (= bill of exchange, a third sense); wrote a gear example
